title: GitHub server via local docker image with a PAT env is REVIEW

origin.description: Public documentation config from github/github-mcp-server (README.md (local docker / ghcr.io)). Content verbatim; only normalized to a valid JSON root. Upstream placeholders preserved.

humanExpectation.rationale: A PAT env is the single review-worthy surface; the ghcr.io image is pinned-by-name and the docker -e flag is benign, so it is REVIEW not BLOCK.
knownLimitations: The token is sourced from a VS Code ${input:...} prompt, not an inline value.
